tools.name: register_genesis
tools.description:
Register an agent's birth. Issues a content-addressed genesis
certificate with a strictly monotone index (epoch 0 = the founding
cohort). parent_id records lineage; children of recalled/quarantined
parents are quarantined at birth. Idempotent — an agent is born once.

tools.name: get_certificate
tools.description: Fetch an agent's genesis certificate + recall/quarantine status.

tools.name: verify_certificate
tools.description: Verify a certificate: recompute its content hash and check the ledger.

tools.name: lineage
tools.description: Full ancestry and descendants of an agent, plus its generation number.

tools.name: recall
tools.description:
Recall an agent: flags it and quarantines every transitive descendant.
Reports exactly which agents were quarantined.

tools.name: list_records
tools.description: List genesis records, optionally by epoch (0 = founding cohort).
